case_title: WINSTON LOUIE VS. B & A BODY WORKS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, WINSTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B & A BODY WORKS, INC. $414.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $459.00, CO-DEFENDANT CHARLES REED IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, DEFECTIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: RICHARD K. BILAFER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, WINSTON AS TO DEFENDANT B & A BODY WORKS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAR-06-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REED, CHARLES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, WINSTON AS TO DEFENDANT REED, CHARLES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-07-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT B & A BODY WORKS, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT B & A BODY WORKS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $414.00 FILED BY LOUIE, WINSTON AS TO DEFENDANT B & A BODY WORKS, INC. REED, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
